reference: TO SOME WITH A SMART SOUSE ON THE EPIGASTER HE WOULD MAKE THEIR MIDRIFF SWAG THEN REDOUBLING THE BLOW GAVE THEM SUCH A HOMEPUSH ON THE NAVEL THAT HE MADE THEIR PUDDINGS TO GUSH OUT
text: to some with their smart soles on their epigaster he would make their midriff swag then redoubling the blow gave them such a home push on the naval that he made their puddings to gush out you
